Video.summary: Tony is pursued by a woman he suspects is filing false complaints.
Video.title: Behind The Storm Door

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: Tony butts heads with both a tough cop who is overzealous in his handling of criminals.
Video.title: The Hatchet

Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: Hunter investigates a theft turned murder when a robbery victim hires a detective to retrieve stolen jewels.
Video.title: Death Machine

Video.summary: Investigating the murder of a famous actress, Hunter follows a killer to Mexico, and learns of CIA interest.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 2

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate mysterious calls to a reporter about a series of murders.
Video.title: Saturday Night Special

Video.summary: When a dead girl disappears from Hunter's living room, he and McCall follow a trail of intrigue and murder.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 1

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Captain Devane investigates his ex-wife's murder and violates his forced leave of absence to pursue the killer
Video.title: Girl On The Beach

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.
Video.title: Renegade

Video.summary: Wrongly suspended from the force for beating a suspect, Hunter pursues the gangster who had him discredited.
Video.title: The Setup

Video.summary: Hunter and Dee get a murder case reopened in order to exonerate a paroled ex-boxer and find the real killer.
Video.title: The Return Of Typhoon Thompson

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's investigation into adultery and homicide pits them against a group of Russian spies.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a student terror group in the car bombing of a Middle-Eastern consulate member.
Video.title: 62 Hrs. Of Terror

Video.summary: Detective Doyle helps investigate the real life murder of an actress-turned-prostitute who was cut in half.
Video.title: The Black Dahlia

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a famous actress and meet her sister, hungry for the inheritance.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 1

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The death of another female cop has a deep psychological effect on Rita.
Video.title: Jasmine

Video.summary: When one of the young men on the basketball team Chris coaches is found murdered, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Crush

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
